# iru_prism (Data Source)

Query any Prism reporting category. Each result entry is returned as a map of string key-value pairs.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `category` (String) The Prism category to query.

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of results to return.
- `offset` (Number) Number of results to skip.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `results` (List of Map of String) List of result entries. Each entry is a map of string key-value pairs.
